app.name: My Closet
app.metaDescription: Your AI stylist that helps you choose outfits from your own clothes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your closet.
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to get started.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email. If an account exists, you’ll get reset instructions.
auth.forgotToast: If an account exists for that email, check your inbox for next steps.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetToast: Password saved. You can sign in with your new password.
auth.resetMissingToken: This page needs a valid link from your email. Open the reset link from your inbox, or request a new one.

premium.title: My Closet Premium
premium.subtitle: Smarter matching, unlimited rolls, and the full stylist experience.
premium.perk2: Full stylist mode — three curated directions at once
premium.perk3: Stronger personalization and ML ranking (no random exploration)
premium.alreadyActive: Premium is active on your account. Enjoy the upgraded experience.
premium.howToUpgrade: Pay securely with UPI, cards, or net banking. Your account upgrades instantly after payment.
premium.socialProof: Join users styling smarter every day 💖
premium.upgradeLegalPrefix: By upgrading you agree to our

outfit.title: Outfit generator
outfit.subtitle: Pick occasion and weather, then build a look from your closet.
outfit.emptyUnlock: Add a few clothes to unlock your outfits ✨
outfit.firstOutfitRetention: Add more clothes to get even better outfits 💖
outfit.emptyWardrobe: Let's add a few clothes first — your future outfits depend on it 👗
outfit.recentlyGeneratedHint: Tap a look to open it again with the same occasion and weather.
outfit.emptySuggestion1: Pick an occasion and weather, then tap Generate — we’ll build a look from your closet.
outfit.emptySuggestion2: Add tops, bottoms, dresses, and shoes so the matcher has more to work with.
outfit.emptySuggestion3: Try Stylist mode for three curated directions in one go.
outfit.emptyHint: Choose options above and tap generate to see a suggested outfit.
outfit.dressReplacesBottom: No separate bottom — your top is a dress.
outfit.stylistFreePreview: Free preview: one curated look. Premium unlocks all three stylist options.
outfit.dailyLimitBody: Come back tomorrow or upgrade to Premium for unlimited outfit generations.
outfit.dailyLimitBanner: You've used all free generations for today. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited access.
outfit.dailyLimitModalTitle: You've used all free outfits today 😔
outfit.dailyLimitModalSubtitle: Unlock unlimited styling and better matches ✨
outfit.premiumLockedSubtitle: Premium includes three curated outfit options for every roll.
outfit.stylistHint: Curated for your closet — tweak with a new roll anytime.

rationale.title: Why this works
rationale.lead: Built for {{occasion}} in {{weather}} weather: pieces align on mood and practicality.
rationale.top: The {{typeLabel}} in {{color}} with a {{style}} feel sets the tone and silhouette.
rationale.bottom: The bottom in {{color}} ({{style}}) balances the palette without competing.
rationale.dressFlow: A dress carries the full look — clean lines, one-and-done elegance.
rationale.footwear: {{color}} footwear ({{style}}) finishes the outfit and keeps the palette cohesive.
rationale.balance: Colors and styles are chosen to read intentional from head to toe.

outfit.feedbackPrompt: Help your stylist learn — how does this look feel?
outfit.shareFailed: Could not create the image. If photos are from another site, try again after they load.
outfit.shareSavedInstead: Sharing isn’t available here — your image was downloaded instead.

savedOutfits.title: Saved outfits
savedOutfits.subtitle: Outfits you bookmarked from the generator.
savedOutfits.empty: No saved outfits yet. Generate a look and tap Save outfit.

clothes.uploadSubtitle:
We suggest type, color, and style from your photo.
Confirm or edit — we only save what you approve ✨
clothes.uploadDropHint: Drag a photo here, or use the buttons below
clothes.uploadSaveNeedsFields: Choose type, color, and style before saving.
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceGemini: Suggested with Google AI (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceOpenAI: Suggested with OpenAI vision (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceGroq: Suggested with Groq vision (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceHuggingFace: Suggested with Hugging Face vision (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceSarvam: Suggested with Sarvam AI (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadAnalyzeSourceFallback: Suggested with on-device analysis (you can still edit).
clothes.uploadMaxItems: You can add up to {{max}} photos at once.
clothes.firstUploadBanner: Add 3–5 clothes to get your first outfit ✨
clothes.uploadCompressFailed: Could not process that image. Try another photo.
clothes.empty: No clothes yet. Upload your first piece.

validation.passwordStrength: Include at least one letter and one number

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.internalError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidResetToken: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one from the login page.
errors.validationFailed: Please check your input and try again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Users, analytics, and system controls.
admin.previewSubtitle: Runs generation against your admin closet using current ML settings (not counted in analytics).
admin.chartGenerationsHint: Last 30 days (UTC). Counts from production generations only.
admin.chartLikeRateHint: Share of likes among feedback submitted each day (last 30 days, UTC).

landing.primaryCta: Try your first outfit in 10 seconds
landing.heroTitle2: You just don't know what to wear.
landing.heroSub1: Let your AI stylist decide in seconds.
landing.heroSub2: No more outfit stress. No more overthinking.

f1.title: Knows what works together
f1.body: No more guessing if colors and cuts clash.

f2.title: Remembers your style
f2.body: Your taste sticks—so suggestions feel like you.

f3.title: Gets better every time you use it
f3.body: The more you interact, the sharper it gets.

f4.title: Stops you from repeating outfits
f4.body: Fresh combos so you're not stuck in a rut.

f5.title: Understands your vibe
f5.body: From chill to sharp—it reads the mood you want.

f6.title: Adapts to your mood
f6.body: Off day or big day—it meets you where you are.

landing.premiumSub2: and outfits that just feel right.
landing.finalEyebrow: Used by people who hate choosing outfits
landing.finalSub: Your next outfit is already waiting.

demo.title: See what your closet can actually do
demo.sub1: These outfits are generated from your own clothes.

howItWorks.title: Three calm steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No endless scrolling. Your closet becomes a living moodboard—then the AI does the pairing.

s1.title: Digitize your closet
s1.body: Snap or upload pieces. We learn your palette, fit, and favorites.

s2.title: Set the vibe
s2.body: Brunch, boardroom, or both—we match the occasion and the weather.

s3.title: Wear the look
s3.body: Curated outfits with rationale. Save, tweak, and share in one tap.

socialProof.title: People are actually loving this
socialProof.q1: I used to stare at my clothes for 20 mins… now it just tells me what to wear 😭
socialProof.q2: It feels like I have a personal stylist in my phone
socialProof.q3: I didn't realize how bad my outfit choices were until this 💀

legal.hindiNotice: Legal text on this page is provided in English for accuracy.
legal.contactIntro: Use the details below for support, billing questions, and legal notices related to My Closet.
legal.contactNoEmail: Add VITE_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL to your frontend environment so customers can reach you. Until then, use in-app flows where available.
legal.contactLegalBody: Replace this section with your registered business name, address, and GST details (if applicable) before going live. Razorpay and regulators typically expect a reachable business identity on your website.
legal.contactPaymentsBody: For failed charges or receipt questions, contact us with your account email and transaction reference. Payment processing is handled by our payment partner; include any order or payment ID shown after checkout.
legal.contactFormIntro: Send a message below and we’ll reply by email.

toasts.outfitLiked: Love it — we’ll lean into this vibe next time.
toasts.outfitDisliked: Thanks — we’ll steer away from similar mixes.
toasts.contactSent: Message sent. We’ll get back to you soon.
toasts.premiumCheckoutLoadFailed: Checkout could not be started. Try again.
